site.name: Istanbul Digital Nomads
site.description: جامعه دیجیتال نومدها در استانبول - کار اشتراکی هفتگی، راهنماهای محلی، و فرود نرم‌تر برای کسانی که مدت بیشتری می‌مانند.

cityGuides.label: راهنماهای شهر
cityGuides.description: محله‌ها، مسکن، ویزا و موارد دیگر

nomadSpaces.label: فضاهای نومد
nomadSpaces.description: کافه‌ها و فضاهای کار اشتراکی با وای‌فای آزموده

localGuides.label: راهنمایان محلی
localGuides.description: افرادی که به استقرارت کمک می‌کنند

events.label: رویدادها
events.description: جلسات کار اشتراکی، گردهمایی‌ها و کارگاه‌ها

footer.newsletterBody: یادداشت‌های کاربردی شهر، راهنماهای تازه و به‌روزرسانی‌های کم‌سروصدا از استانبول.
footer.tagline: ریتم محلی، راهنماهای کاربردی و فرود نرم‌تر برای دیجیتال نومدهایی که مدت بیشتری در استانبول می‌مانند.

languageSwitcher.label: زبان
languageSwitcher.translationInProgress: متن اصلی به انگلیسی است. ترجمه در حال انجام است.

hero.title: Build your Istanbul work rhythm in 7 days.
hero.subtitle: Choose a base, learn the ferry loop, and save the laptop-safe tables locals trust after sunset.
hero.imageAlt: A calm Moda waterfront table with tea, notebook, and the Istanbul skyline beyond

kadikoyPier.title: Kadikoy pier
kadikoyPier.detail: Pick a walkable base with breakfast, metro, and ferries nearby.

karakoyTable.title: Karakoy table
karakoyTable.detail: Cross with one job to do and a saved list of laptop-safe seats.

galataEvening.title: Galata evening
galataEvening.detail: Meet the people who know where the city works after dark.

firstWeekTool.title: Turn your first week into a real Istanbul routine.
firstWeekTool.body: Pick your base, work setup, social pace, and budget comfort. Get a seven-day plan with ferry confidence, work blocks, admin buffer, and the right links for week two.

stats.intro: Built for people who want a city that becomes workable quickly, not just another place to pass through.

events.title: This week's events
events.intro: Coworking sessions, meetups, and workshops happening in Istanbul this week.
events.datesScheduledTitle: The next coworking dates are coming together.
events.datesScheduledBody: Join the Telegram group for the current informal coworking thread while the public calendar catches up.

moments.1: Quiet work session with reliable wifi and plenty of regulars who welcome first-timers.
moments.2: The easiest event to meet people fast, especially if you just arrived and want social momentum.
moments.3: Bring real questions about freelancing, residency, and how to stay compliant while living here.

cityGuides.title: Everything you need for your first month.
cityGuides.intro: Neighborhoods, coworking, housing, internet, transport, cost of living, and more - written by people living here.
cityGuides.subIntro: Think of them as confidence builders for your first month, not a static resource archive.
cityGuides.fastAnswersBody: Housing, internet, transport, visa basics, and neighborhood fit.

orientation.fastInternet: How do I get online fast?

firstMonth.title: Start with the pieces that make remote life easier to operate.
firstMonth.body: If you just landed, begin with neighborhoods, internet, transit, and this week's meetup. It's the fastest path from arrival mode to a workable local routine.

weekOne.title: A workable routine, fast
weekOne.description: Wifi-tested cafes, a coworking session to drop into, and a neighborhood that fits your pace.

monthOne.title: Familiar faces in familiar places
monthOne.description: The weekly rhythm means you keep running into the same people - and that's how real friendships start.

monthThree.title: A city that feels like yours
monthThree.description: You've got a ferry route, a favorite baklava spot, and people who text you when something good is happening.

whyStay.title: Why nomads keep extending their stay.
whyStay.body: What changes after you join is simple: your workweeks get steadier, the city gets easier to read, and familiar faces start showing up in the places you already like to be.

reliableWorkdays.title: Reliable workdays
reliableWorkdays.description: Coworking sessions, cafe picks, and practical setup advice.

lowFriction.title: Low-friction onboarding
lowFriction.description: Helpful answers fast, without having to search five groups.

localTexture.title: Better local texture
localTexture.description: Meet people who know the city and still remember what it feels like to arrive.

card.title: Ask one question and skip hours of guesswork.
card.body: Where should you base yourself for your first month? Which coworking spots have stable wifi? How do ferries change your commute? The community makes those answers social, current, and local.

bullets.tradeoffs: Neighborhood tradeoffs explained by people living here
bullets.rituals: Weekly rituals that make meeting people feel easier
bullets.setup: Practical setup help for workdays, transit, and housing
bullets.landing: A softer landing if you're staying more than a few weeks

joinCta.title: Join us on Telegram.
joinCta.body: Introduce yourself and we'll point you to this week's meetup, a good workspace, or the right neighborhood to start from.
